case_title: CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, A MUNICIPAL CORP VS. TIMOTHY BARRETT et al

docket_entries.description: CASE DISMISSED BY COURT AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING OCT-14-2003 AT 10:00AM PURSUANT TO CRC 225. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Oct-16-2003 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Notice having been given and there being no appearance or an opposition filed. The court orders case dismissed pursuant to California Rules of Court Section 225. Proceedings reported by: Margaret del Coto, CSR# 8493. (212)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jul-23-2003 Case Settled - Set For Crc 525 Hearing On Oct-14-03 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 212
MINI MINUTES: Appearance for plaintiff. Order to Show Cause re Dismissal pursuant to CRC 225 set for 10/14/2003 at 1:30 pm in Dept. 212. Proceedings reported by Mary Hinds. (212)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar May-14-2003 Continued To Jul-23-03 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212
MINI MINUTES: Appearance for plaintiff. The order to show cause is re-set for 7/23/2003 at 1:30 pm in Dept. 212. Proceedings reported by Romy Barulich, CSR 241. (212)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-14-2003 Continued To May-14-03 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212
